# Coil

> Earn yield on idle limit order capital on Solana.

Coil is a non-custodial DeFi platform that turns idle limit order capital into yield-generating positions via Jupiter Lend.

## How It Works

1. Place a limit order on Coil
2. Capital is deposited into Jupiter Lend, earning 3-8% variable APY via jlTokens
3. When target price hits, Coil auto-executes — jlToken redemption + swap in one atomic transaction
4. Zero idle time — your money earns yield until the exact last second

## Key Features

- Yield-bearing limit orders with auto-execution
- OTOCO orders (entry + take-profit + stop-loss) via Jupiter Trigger
- DCA with yield — remaining capital earns while slices execute
- Multi-vault: USDC, USDG, JupUSD, SOL, USDT
- Non-custodial — funds go to Jupiter Lend, never held by Coil
- Zero liquidation risk (supply-only lending)

## Fees

- 0.1% swap fee on execution
- 8% performance fee on earned yield only
- No deposit, withdrawal, or subscription fees

## Links

- Site: https://coil.ag
- Docs: https://coil-1.gitbook.io/coil-docs
